name: Saburo Odajima
description: One of the Four Ramen Emperors of Tokyo. In the past, Saburo was in a relationship with [The Glutton Girl of Jinbocho](https://anilist.co/character/276380/Jinbouchou-no-Glutton-Girl), but he broke up with her over their polar opposite ramen styles, believing they'll eventually end up at each other's throats.
